item.title: After Ethereum, Bitcoin Whales Pile Back In With $15.6B Accumulation Over Three Months
item.description: Analysts are taking notice of Bitcoin after Ethereum's accumulation patterns where Tom Lee noted that Ethereum has repeatedly recovered in a V-shape a...

item.title: Supreme Court Blocks Trump’s Tariffs, Tom Lee Thinks It Could Be Bitcoin’s Next Bullish Trigger
item.description: Last year, when President Trump imposed a 100% tariff hike on China, the crypto market saw over $19 billion in liquidation.

item.title: Scaramucci Calls Banks ‘Cab Companies’, Frames Coinbase And Tether As ‘Uber’
item.description: Coinbase earns a share of USDC reserve revenue, including 50% of Circle’s residual payment base under their partnership model.

item.title: ‘Bitcoin Is Dead’ Searches Spike On Google To Post-FTX Highs, But Traders Not Over With Crypto Yet
item.description: Even Binance co-founder Changpeng Zhao (CZ) appeared uncertain about how to read the spike in “Bitcoin is dead” searches.

item.title: SVRA Stock Rises After Hours As FDA Grants Priority Review For Lung Disorder Therapy
item.description: The company is seeking approval for Molbreevi to treat patients with Autoimmune Pulmonary Alveolar Proteinosis (autoimmune PAP).
